headline: Native American VC Relevance Ventures Unveils Market-Rate Impact Strategy as Ex-Transact Exec Returns After $1.6 Billion Sale
summary: Relevance Ventures, one of the only independently owned Native American venture capital firms in the United States, announced today that Dean Newton has returned full-time as Chairman and General Partner, formalizing the launch of the firm's market-rate, performance-driven impact investing strategy.
